digest.en: US President Trump has ordered the US military to "shoot and kill" Iranian boats that mine the Strait of Hormuz. A teenager in Pakistan's Karachi has died from the Congo virus. Germany is voicing frustration with Israel, a longtime ally, amid ongoing tensions in the region.
digest.hi:
हेती में आपराधिक गुटों की हिंसा चरम पर है। 
गैंग हिंसा ने व्यापक अराजकता और तबाही मचा दी है। 
पाकिस्तान ने मध्यस्थता की पेशकश की थी जिसे ईरान ने ठुकरा दिया।

articles.title: Trump Threatens Iranian Boats He Says Are Mining the Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Oil prices hovered above $100 a barrel as reported ship seizures added to market anxiety. The White House said President Trump does not view Iran's reported seizures as a cease-fire violation.

articles.title: Trump orders U.S. military to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats mining Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: US President Trump ordered the military to shoot and kill Iranian boats mining the Strait of Hormuz. Live updates: Trump orders U. S. military to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats mining Strait of Hormuz NBC News.

articles.title: Teenager becomes first Congo virus fatality in Pakistan's Karachi
articles.summary: A teenager in Karachi became the first Congo virus fatality in Pakistan. Concern among health officials in Karachi with the festival of Id al-Azha due next month. Teenager becomes first Congo virus fatality in Pakistan's Karachi.

articles.title: New multilateral force for gang-plagued Haiti to deploy soon, UN told
articles.summary: A new multilateral force will deploy to Haiti to address gang issues. New multilateral force for gang-plagued Haiti to deploy soon, UN told France 24.

articles.title: Above 92% turnout in Bengal, 85% in Tamil Nadu amid poll violence | Above the Fold | 23.04.2026
articles.summary: Bengal saw 92% voter turnout and Tamil Nadu 85% amid poll violence. In today’s episode, we look at the key election trends in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal, tracking major shifts ahead of polling.

articles.title: Trump orders U.S. Navy to 'shoot, kill' small boats laying mines in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Pakistan's minister and a US envoy discussed efforts for a second round of US-Iran talks. Iran’s vow not to reopen the Strait of Hormuz so long as a U. S. naval blockade remained in place.

articles.title: "Uninformed, Inappropriate, In Poor Taste": India After Trump 'Hell-Hole' Row
articles.summary: India criticized Donald Trump for sharing a derogatory post about the country. Donald Trump had shared a derogatory post on India made by a podcaster. "Uninformed, Inappropriate, In Poor Taste": India After Trump 'Hell-Hole' Row.

articles.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
articles.summary: Donald Trump said the King's visit could help repair US and UK relations. In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

articles.title: Germany, a Steadfast Ally of Israel, Now Voices Some Frustration
articles.summary: German officials criticized Israel, conveying Berlin's frustration with its ally. In recent weeks, German officials have issued critical comments about Israel that convey Berlin’s recent frustration with its longtime ally.

articles.title: Russian Town Sees Toxic Rain After Ukraine Strike, Officials Issue Warning
articles.summary: Ukraine's drone attack on a Russian oil refinery in Tuapse caused toxic rain. Thick plumes of smoke rise from an oil refinery in Russia's Tuapse after an Ukrainian drone attack.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Waiting for US greenlight', Israel says ready to
articles.summary: Iran received its first revenue from tolls collected at the Strait of Hormuz. The payment was made after a recent agreement. The official did not disclose the revenue amount. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iran receives first revenue from Strait of Hormuz tolls, says official The Times of India.

articles.title: Trump issues lethal order after US seizes Iranian oil tanker in Indian Ocean
articles.summary: The US seized an Iranian oil tanker in the Indian Ocean, prompting a response. Trump issues lethal order after US seizes Iranian oil tanker in Indian Ocean.

articles.title: US-Israeli war on Iran will push 30 million back into poverty, UN warns
articles.summary: The US-Israeli conflict with Iran may push 30 million into poverty, the UN warns. Disruption to fuel and fertiliser supplies due to the Strait of Hormuz closure will hit crop yields, UNDP chief warns.

articles.title: Old-Economy Investments Gain New Appeal in Confounding Markets
articles.summary: Old-economy investments are gaining appeal due to market uncertainty. Old-Economy Investments Gain New Appeal in Confounding Markets Bloomberg. com.

articles.title: Exiled Iranian crown prince splattered with red liquid in Berlin after slashing US-Iran truce
articles.summary: Iranian crown prince Reza Pahlavi was splattered with red liquid in Berlin after criticizing a US-Iran truce. The incident occurred outside a hotel where Pahlavi was speaking. Police are investigating the attack.

articles.title: Warner Bros shareholders approve Paramount’s takeover
articles.summary: Warner Bros shareholders approved Paramount's takeover. The deal still requires regulatory approval from Washington and London. Ongoing reviews by the US Department of Justice are expected to examine the merger's impact.

articles.title: Warner Bros Shareholders Approve Paramount's $81 Billion Takeover
articles.summary: Warner Bros shareholders approved Paramount's $81 billion takeover. The deal still faces regulatory reviews, including from the US Department of Justice. The outcome of these reviews will determine the merger's final approval.

articles.title: $106 Billion Loan Reflects E.U.’s View That Peace in Ukraine Is Far Away
articles.summary: The European Union loaned Ukraine $106 billion for military spending. Unlike previous European assistance packages, this one is heavily weighted toward military spending, meant to put Ukraine on solid footing for a long fight.

articles.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
articles.summary: US-Kuwaiti journalist Ahmed Shihab-Eldin was acquitted in Kuwait over social media posts. He faced charges, including spreading false information, for re-posting images related to the Iran war. Shihab-Eldin's lawyers confirmed the acquittal.

articles.title: Israel attacks kill journalist and target first responders
articles.summary: Israeli strikes in Lebanon killed a journalist and targeted first responders. A fragile ceasefire holds as Israeli strikes kill a journalist and target first responders in Lebanon. Israel attacks kill journalist and target first responders.

articles.title: US to ‘shoot and kill’ Iranian boats laying mines in Hormuz, Trump says
articles.summary: US President Trump said the US will shoot and kill Iranian boats laying mines in the Hormuz Strait. US says it intercepted another tanker carrying Iranian oil as Trump underscores alleged infighting within Iran's leadership.

articles.title: आपराधिक गुटों की हिंसा से त्रस्त हेती, ‘एक अहम मोड़ पर खड़ा है’

articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र की एक रिपोर्ट में कहा गया है कि भारत में मानसून के दौरान 'सामान्य से कम' बारिश होने का अनुमान है, जिससे फसलों पर लू का खतरा बढ़ गया है. यह भारत की कृषि के लिए एक बड़ी चुनौती हो सकती है.

articles.title: बर्लिन में ईरान के पूर्व शहजादे रजा पहलवी पर हमला, प्रेस कॉन्फ्रेंस के बाद फेंका लाल तरल पदार्थ

articles.title: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ने पहले भारत को बताया था नरक, अब कहा- यह महान देश, शीर्ष पर मेरे दोस्त
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रम्प ने पहले भारत को "नरक" कहा था, लेकिन अब उन्होंने कहा कि भारत एक महान देश है और उनके शीर्ष पर एक मित्र है। यह ट्रम्प के बयान में एक बड़ा बदलाव है।

articles.title: भीषण गर्मी ने तोड़ा कृषि चक्र, 100 करोड़ लोगों पर संकट; संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने चेताया
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने चेतावनी दी है कि भीषण गर्मी ने कृषि चक्र को तोड़ दिया है और 100 करोड़ लोगों पर संकट आ गया है। यह संकट वैश्विक खाद्य सुरक्षा के लिए एक बड़ा खतरा है।

articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस नाटो देशों की एक सूची बना रहा है, जिसमें दोस्तों को गिफ्ट और दुश्मनों को सजा दी जाएगी। यह निर्णय ट्रंप के नाटो सहयोगियों के साथ संबंधों के कारण लिया गया है।
